payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Narrow, partial view of a white-painted cabinet door frame and jamb with interior wooden shelves visible through the opening holding stacked round decorative items (plates or vases); the object is edge-cropped and appears close to the camera, approximately 1.0 m away.
